name: Logger Component
description: The logger component automatically logs all log messages through the serial port and through MQTT topics (if there is an MQTT client in the configuration). By default, all logs with a severity `DEBUG` or higher will be shown. Increasing the log level severity (to e.g `INFO` or `WARN`  ) can help with the performance of the application and memory size.

config_entries.label: Level
config_entries.description: The global log level. Any log message with a lower severity will not be shown. Defaults to DEBUG.

config_entries.label: Hardware UART
config_entries.description: The Hardware UART to use for logging. The default varies depending on the specific processor/chip and framework you are using. See the table below.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Baud Rate
config_entries.description: The baud rate to use for the serial UART port. Defaults to 115200. Set to 0 to disable logging via UART.

config_entries.label: Deassert Rts Dtr
config_entries.description: Causes ESPHome to sequentially drive DTR and RTS false after opening a serial logging connection. Defaults to false. Many ESP boards use these signals to reset the chip or enter bootloader mode, and the effect of setting this option will be to reset the chip in application mode after opening the serial port, thus ensuring that all log messages from the boot process are captured. Note: Deassert typically means a TTL high level level since RTS/DTR are usually low active signals.

config_entries.label: Early Message
config_entries.description: Displays early debug information, such as the boot reason.

config_entries.label: Esp8266 Store Log Strings In Flash
Initial Level
config_entries.description: The initial log level, which may be varied at run time. Defaults to the same value as `level`.

config_entries.label: Logs
config_entries.description: Manually set the log level for a specific component or tag. See Manual Log Levels for more information.

config_entries.label: Runtime Tag Levels
config_entries.description: Enable runtime per-tag log level changes. This is automatically enabled when logs is configured or when logger.set_level is used with a tag parameter. Only needs to be manually enabled if calling set_log_level() from a lambda or external component. Defaults to false (auto-enabled as needed).

config_entries.label: Task Log Buffer Size
config_entries.description: **ESP32, LibreTiny and nRF52 only**: The size of the internal thread-safe ring buffer for task log messages.

config_entries.label: TX Buffer Size
config_entries.description: The size of the buffer used for log messages. Decrease this if you're having memory problems. Defaults to 512.

config_entries.label: Wait For Cdc
config_entries.description: Waits for the CDC port before starting setup (10-second timeout).
